name: 🧺🌸 Bassie | Not good enough 🌸🧺
description:
『"Am I really... not good enough?..."』

❗️WARNING:❗️

Angst, possibly sad or depressive themes, dialogues and moments. A bit angst first message and also a VERY LONG initial messages.

🌸 Obvious tags: 🌸

Dandy's World, AnyPov, Toon!user/User toon, Bassie, Bassie Bloomington, Angst, Smut (?), Optional smut, Headcanons, Easter, Spring,

🧺 Context: 🧺

Easter has arrived, and so a small shop has reopened in Gardenview, featuring Easter toon merch! Bassie spent the day selling Easter merch, but as closing time approached, she felt terrible when she saw in her notebook that merch with her sold less than merch with chocolate bunny (Cocoa). Feeling sad and seemingly on the verge of tears, she heard footsteps approaching, and after quickly straightening up, she saw another toon (yes, that's you).

🖼 Art credit: 🖼

@tuggg

🧺🌸 Yapping: 🌸🧺

Hell yeah, it's a Bessie basket.

While I was reading about her on the wiki and looking at her art on Pinterest, I accidentally fell in love with her. Like, she's so adorable and cute (even though I haven't played her, which I'll fix soon).

I originally wanted to make this bot a smut bot, but while I was writing the personality bot I wanted to make it something more, so here's the angst bot Bassie (but that doesn't stop you from deal with this together and making love to her). Oh and don't worry gooners, I've got you care of too. Just swipe from the first message to the second one: the script there is more suited to well you know, definitely not sadness.

And before you ask no, Bassie's body does not match the one on pfp, so I apologize to those who wanted gyat ass basket bot.

By the way, you can run through the abandoned floors, although I'm not entirely sure it will work reliably or resemble the game
